cli.description: Hacker News from your terminal — with a local store, full-text search, and agent-native output no other HN tool has
cli.name: hackernews-pp-cli

commands.name: api
commands.short: Browse all API endpoints by interface name

commands.name: completion
commands.short: Generate the autocompletion script for the specified shell

flags.name: no-descriptions
flags.usage: disable completion descriptions

subcommands.name: bash
subcommands.short: Generate the autocompletion script for bash

flags.name: no-descriptions
flags.usage: disable completion descriptions

subcommands.name: fish
subcommands.short: Generate the autocompletion script for fish

flags.name: no-descriptions
flags.usage: disable completion descriptions

subcommands.name: powershell
subcommands.short: Generate the autocompletion script for powershell

flags.name: no-descriptions
flags.usage: disable completion descriptions

subcommands.name: zsh
subcommands.short: Generate the autocompletion script for zsh

flags.name: limit
flags.usage: Maximum results to return

flags.name: min-comments
flags.usage: Floor on descendants count to avoid drive-by submissions

flags.name: min-score
flags.usage: Floor on points to avoid divide-by-zero noise

flags.name: window
flags.usage: Only include stories from this recent duration (e.g., 7d, 24h, 12h, 30d)

commands.name: controversial
commands.short: Find stories with the highest comment-to-point ratio (polarizing discussions)

flags.name: fail-on
flags.usage: Exit non-zero when a health level is reached: stale, error. Default is never.

commands.name: doctor
commands.short: Check CLI health

commands.name: export
commands.short: Export data to JSONL or JSON for backup, migration, or analysis

flags.name: send
flags.usage: POST to the configured feedback endpoint in addition to local write

flags.name: stdin
flags.usage: Read feedback body from stdin rather than arguments

commands.name: feedback
commands.short: Record feedback about this CLI (local by default; upstream opt-in)

flags.name: limit
flags.usage: Maximum number of recent entries to return

subcommands.name: list
subcommands.short: List recent feedback entries

commands.name: freelance
commands.short: Mine 'Ask HN: Freelancer? Seeking Freelancer?' threads

subcommands.name: filter
subcommands.short: Filter the latest 'Freelancer? Seeking freelancer?' thread by regex

commands.name: help
commands.short: Help about any command

commands.name: hiring
commands.short: Mine 'Ask HN: Who is hiring' threads (filter, stats, companies)

flags.name: min-posts
flags.usage: Only show companies that posted in at least this many of the scanned months

flags.name: months
flags.usage: Number of recent monthly hiring threads to scan (1-12)

subcommands.name: companies
subcommands.short: Companies posting across the last N hiring threads — first-seen, last-seen, months count

subcommands.name: filter
subcommands.short: Filter the latest 'Ask HN: Who is hiring' thread by regex

flags.name: months
flags.usage: Number of recent monthly threads to scan (1-12)

subcommands.name: stats
subcommands.short: Aggregate Who's Hiring threads across N months — top languages, remote ratio, top companies

flags.name: batch-size
flags.usage: Records per batch (future: batch API support)

flags.name: dry-run
flags.usage: Preview import without sending requests

flags.name: input
flags.usage: Input JSONL file path (use - for stdin)

commands.name: import
commands.short: Import data from JSONL file via API create/upsert calls

commands.name: items
commands.short: Get details for a specific story, comment, job, or poll

flags.name: hn
flags.usage: Use the HN thread URL even when the story has its own URL

flags.name: launch
flags.usage: Actually open the URL in the default browser instead of just printing it

subcommands.name: open
subcommands.short: Print or launch a story URL or HN thread (--launch to open in browser)

flags.name: author
flags.usage: Only include comments by this username

flags.name: depth
flags.usage: Maximum depth of replies to include (0 = no limit)

flags.name: flat
flags.usage: Render comments as a flat list instead of a tree

flags.name: match
flags.usage: Only include comments whose text matches this regex

flags.name: since
flags.usage: Only include comments newer than this duration (e.g., 24h, 7d)

subcommands.name: thread
subcommands.short: Print a thread's comment tree using Algolia's one-shot fetch

commands.name: maxitem
commands.short: Returns the largest item ID currently assigned by Hacker News

commands.name: profile
commands.short: Named sets of flags saved for reuse

subcommands.name: delete
subcommands.short: Remove a profile

subcommands.name: list
subcommands.short: List saved profiles

flags.name: description
flags.usage: Short description shown in 'profile list'

subcommands.name: save
subcommands.short: Save the current invocation's non-default flags as a named profile

subcommands.name: show
subcommands.short: Show a profile's values as JSON

subcommands.name: use
subcommands.short: Print the flag values a profile will apply (does not execute anything)

flags.name: days
flags.usage: Window in days (1-180)

flags.name: hits-per-page
flags.usage: Max hits to fetch (capped at 1000 by Algolia)

commands.name: pulse
commands.short: Show what HN is saying about a topic this week — score, comment, frequency by day

flags.name: include-comments
flags.usage: Also search comments for the URL (broader, noisier)

commands.name: repost
commands.short: Has this URL been posted on HN before? Lists prior submissions with scores and dates

flags.name: by-date
flags.usage: Sort by date (newest first) instead of relevance

flags.name: hits-per-page
flags.usage: Results per page (max 100)

flags.name: min-comments
flags.usage: Only include items with at least this many comments

flags.name: min-points
flags.usage: Only include stories with at least this many points

flags.name: page
flags.usage: Page number (0-indexed)

flags.name: since
flags.usage: Only include items newer than this duration (e.g., 7d, 24h)

flags.name: tag
flags.usage: Algolia tag filter: story, comment, ask_hn, show_hn, job, poll, author_<name>

flags.name: until
flags.usage: Only include items older than this duration ago

commands.name: search
commands.short: Search Hacker News stories and comments live via the Algolia API

flags.name: limit
flags.usage: Maximum results to return

flags.name: type
flags.usage: Filter results to one resource type (stories, ask, show, jobs, users)

subcommands.name: local
subcommands.short: Full-text search across the local SQLite store of synced stories and comments

flags.name: list
flags.usage: Front-page list to diff (topstories, beststories, newstories)

commands.name: since
commands.short: Show what changed on the front page since last sync (added, removed, moved stories)

commands.name: stories
commands.short: Browse top, new, and best Hacker News stories

flags.name: limit
flags.usage: Maximum number of story IDs to return (max 200)

subcommands.name: ask
subcommands.short: Get the latest Ask HN posts

flags.name: limit
flags.usage: Maximum number of story IDs to return (max 200)

subcommands.name: best
subcommands.short: Get the highest-voted stories on Hacker News

flags.name: limit
flags.usage: Maximum number of story IDs to return (max 200)

subcommands.name: job
subcommands.short: Get the latest Hacker News job postings

flags.name: limit
flags.usage: Maximum number of story IDs to return (max 500)

subcommands.name: new
subcommands.short: Get the newest stories on Hacker News

flags.name: limit
flags.usage: Maximum number of story IDs to return (max 200)

subcommands.name: show
subcommands.short: Get the latest Show HN posts

flags.name: limit
flags.usage: Maximum number of story IDs to return (max 500)

subcommands.name: top
subcommands.short: Get the current top stories on Hacker News

flags.name: concurrency
flags.usage: Number of parallel sync workers

flags.name: db
flags.usage: Database path (default: ~/.local/share/hackernews-pp-cli/data.db)

flags.name: full
flags.usage: Full resync (ignore previous checkpoint)

flags.name: latest-only
flags.usage: Refresh head of each resource only; clears resume cursor and caps pages at 1. Mutually exclusive with --since (--since wins).

flags.name: max-pages
flags.usage: Maximum pages to fetch per resource (0 = unlimited; cap-hit emits a sync_warning event)

flags.name: resources
flags.usage: Comma-separated resource types to sync

flags.name: since
flags.usage: Incremental sync duration (e.g. 7d, 24h, 1w, 30m)

flags.name: strict
flags.usage: Exit non-zero on any per-resource failure (default: only critical failures or all-resource failure exit non-zero).

commands.name: sync
commands.short: Sync API data to local SQLite for offline search and analysis

commands.name: updates
commands.short: Items and user profiles that have changed recently

commands.name: users
commands.short: Get a user's profile including karma and submission history

flags.name: limit
flags.usage: Max submissions to consider (capped at 1000)

subcommands.name: stats
subcommands.short: Submission stats for a user: score buckets, traction rate, hour-of-day distribution

commands.name: velocity
commands.short: Show a story's rank trajectory across local snapshots

commands.name: version
commands.short: Print version

flags.name: limit
flags.usage: Maximum number of matches to return

commands.name: which
commands.short: Find the command that implements a capability

commands.name: workflow
commands.short: Compound workflows that combine multiple API operations

flags.name: db
flags.usage: Database path (default: ~/.local/share/hackernews-pp-cli/data.db)

flags.name: full
flags.usage: Full re-archive (ignore previous sync state)

subcommands.name: archive
subcommands.short: Sync all resources to local store for offline access and search

flags.name: db
flags.usage: Database path

subcommands.name: status
subcommands.short: Show local archive status and sync state for all resources

registry.description: Hacker News from your terminal — with a local SQLite store, snapshot history, and agent-native output no other HN tool has.
registry.name: hackernews
